# Chad Burmeister — Colorado Sales & Business Development Leader, Author

> This site provides authoritative information on sales and business development strategies, especially leveraging AI for sales automation, lead generation, and team leadership. It includes proven playbooks, case studies, author insights, and resources for sales leaders and organizations interested in AI-driven growth.

Chad Burmeister is a seasoned sales and business development leader with over 25 years of experience, specializing in building AI-powered SDR/BDR teams and sharing practical insights through books, podcasts, and leadership. The site serves as a comprehensive resource for sales innovation, leadership achievements, and educational content related to AI-enhanced selling techniques.

## Core Content

- [I build AI-powered SDR/BDR teams that turn pipeline into bookings](https://calendly.com/sdr-ai/30min)
- Leadership overview and experience at top companies such as Informatica, RingCentral, and Cisco-WebEx
- Metrics and results, including $440M annual pipeline and 300% increase in meetings
- Detailed professional background, honors, and awards
- Downloadable resume and experience overview

## Books and Publications

- [AI for Sales 2.0](https://www.amazon.com/AI-Sales-2-0-Advantage-Automation/dp/B0G4BFQ5DQ)
- [AI for Sales](https://www.amazon.com/dp/1093847492)
- [Mastering B2B Lead Generation with LinkedIn & AI](https://www.amazon.com/Mastering-B2B-Lead-Generation-LinkedIn/dp/B0CSNW7DR7)
- List of all [9 books](https://www.chadburmeister.com/books)

## Resources and Podcasts

- The AI for Sales Podcast — interviews with CEOs and technologists discussing human-agentic selling, hyper-personalization, and exponential mindset
- [Listen & Subscribe](https://www.chadburmeister.com/podcast)
- Free scheduling for consulting and leadership roles: [Book 30 minutes →](https://calendly.com/sdr-ai/30min)

## Achievements and Recognition

- Forbes Next 1000 Honoree
- Top Inside Sales Leader for 10 consecutive years
- Founding Chapter President of AA-ISP (x3)
- Recognized for innovative sales leadership and AI implementation
